case_title: ELIOT CANICK VS. EXHIBIT INSTALLATION SPECIALISTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANICK, ELIOT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EXHIBIT INSTALLATION SPECIALISTS, INC. A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION
